markets.rules_primary: If Pedri records at least 3 assists during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Spain vs Cape Verde professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 15, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Spain vs Cape Verde professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 15, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's assists recorded.
markets.title: Pedri: 3+ assists?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Kinaa Graham wins the Dookie vs Graham professional tennis match in the 2026 Billie Jean King Cup Qualifiers Round after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Dookie vs Graham professional tennis match in the 2026 Billie Jean King Cup Qualifiers Round after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), all markets will resolve to $0.50. If a player withdraws or forfeits after a match has started, that player will resolve to No. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).
markets.title: Will Kinaa Graham win the Dookie vs Graham: Billie Jean King Cup Qualifiers Round match?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Tie is the result of the first half of regulation time in the Las Vegas vs Dallas women's professional basketball game originally scheduled for Jun 15, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the team that scores the most points during the specified half of regulation. Only points scored during the specified half of play count towards this market. If both teams score the same amount of points during the half, all team strikes resolve to No and the Tie strike resolves to Yes. If this game is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled game has finished (within two weeks).
markets.title: Las Vegas vs Dallas: First Half Winner?
